Lumify
Table of Contents

Class Note_LinkItem

Namespace
lumify.api.Models.EF
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

A link item module within a note — a labelled URL. Ordered within the note via NotePos. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

public class Note_LinkItem
Inheritance
object
Note_LinkItem

Properties

CreatedAt

Creation timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string CreatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

DeletedAt

Soft-delete timestamp (ISO-8601 string); null while active.

public string? DeletedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ID

Primary key (GUID string).

public string ID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Label

Optional display label for the link.

public string? Label { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Note

The parent note.

public virtual Note Note { get; set; }

Property Value

Note

NoteID

The note this link item belongs to.

public string NoteID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

NotePos

Zero-based position of this module within its note.

public int NotePos { get; set; }

Property Value

int

UpdatedAt

Last-update timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string UpdatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Url

The target URL.

public string Url { get; set; }
